info.title: Data Ingestion & Privacy Intelligence API
info.description:
Proteccio Discover backend covering Week 1 ingestion, Week 2 discovery/classification/mapping/profiling, Week 3 governance/compliance intelligence, and Week 4 source onboarding, Supabase-backed persistence, realtime dashboard updates, end-to-end workflow orchestration, reporting, RBAC, alerting, and global search.

**Auth:** When `JWT_SECRET` or Supabase Auth is configured, use `POST /api/auth/login` and send `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. When only `API_KEY` is set, send `Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>` or `X-API-Key: <API_KEY>` on `/api/*` except `/health` and documentation routes.

**Docs UI:** `GET /docs` (Swagger UI). **Raw spec:** `GET /openapi.json`.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: JWT login, current principal, roles, and user administration (RBAC).

tags.name: Sources
tags.description: Source onboarding, configuration, and status monitoring.

tags.name: Mapping
tags.description: Systems, datasets, fields, flows, lineage, export.

tags.name: Remediation
tags.description: Remediation workflow tickets, status, severity, and audit history.

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Search datasets, mapped fields, duplicate-sensitive groups.

tags.name: Reporting
tags.description: Audit-ready governance reports (PDF, CSV, JSON) with searchable history.

tags.name: Alerts
tags.description: Queue-based alerting with deduplication, email, and in-app notifications.

post.summary: Login and receive JWT access token
Self-service signup; new users start as viewers
Logout and revoke Supabase session when available
Run ingestion to reporting end-to-end workflow
Upload file and return preview rows
Materialize mapping from discovery (+ optional classification)
Build profiling (+ optional risk + catalog persist)
Full privacy risk analysis from discovery

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search source, risk type, action, assignee

post.summary: Bulk-create tickets from risk prioritization queue

get.summary: Search governance datasets (compliance, risk, remediation, multi-label, keyword, cursor)
Global keyword search across datasets, fields, remediation, lineage, sources
Search data lineage by dataset, system, flow, or related source name
Search remediation tickets (unresolved filter, keyword, cursor)
List supported report types and export formats
Get stored report with full structured content
Download report (JSON, CSV, or PDF attachment)
Alert counts by status and type

post.summary: Mark all in-app notifications as read

bearerAuth.description: JWT from POST /api/auth/login when JWT_SECRET is set; otherwise API_KEY value.

apiKeyHeader.name: X-API-Key
apiKeyHeader.description: Same value as API_KEY when set.

discovery.description: If true, attach discovery scan on normalized batch.

ComplianceControlHints.description: Governance control attestations used by the compliance intelligence engine.
